name: ExtensionAccount_Procedure
title: R5: The list of procedures relevant to this account (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Account.procedure` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Account.procedure` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Account.procedure` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Account.procedure` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.procedure` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
